title: Visible Advancements
description: Mod that displays all (non hidden) advancements, even if prerequisites aren't complete
body:
So while working on a custom modpack for the two week Minecraft phase, I decided to use custom Advancements to display progression and how to get into certain mods. I then realised that by default Minecraft only displays the next 2 "depths" of Advancements.

This mod aims to solve this problem by forcing the game to display all Advancements, even if they are not unlocked yet. Advancements marked as "Hidden" still won't display until you actually unlock them.

Here's how the mod changes the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod's Advancements 

![Advancements tab before the mod is applied, displaying only 4 advancements in the next 2 columns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7300605d16cedaccc21971aebde1cfb22d806dc2.png)
![Advancements tab after the mod is added, displaying all the available Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfa0cb9c6bc079c57eb05b042247bfd0a873364c.png)
*I strongly recommend playing with [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) to increase the size of the Advancements menu!*

This is done through a single Mixin file, and I have tested it on modpacks with over 300 mods with no issues, so it should work mostly fine.
